name: VEECO INSTRUMENTS INC
summary: PARTI Business Description and Overview Headquartered in Plainview, New York, we were organized as a Delaware corporation in 1989. We are a manufacturer of advanced semiconductor process equipment that solves an array of challenging materials engineering problems for our customers.
